## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that HydraLab makes hard or impossible today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you would like to happen. Sketches, mockups, and API ideas welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches or workarounds you have thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Phase / scope note

<!--
HydraLab is pre-release and macOS-first. If you know, note which area this
touches (web app, Chrome extension, desktop shell, backend) and whether it
fits the current local-first scope — features that require data to leave the
machine without explicit user action are out of scope.
-->
